name: property managers handling 5–15 leases/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 leases/month, missed renewal reminders cause cash flow gaps. We automate renewal reminders instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking lease renewals and occupancy rates
